ONLY DURING OPEN HOURS OF INDIANGRASS PRESERVE. 

Dewberry, Maypop, Goldenrod, Peppervine grow along Anne Hamilton trail. Hot spots change yearly. 

Grove of small pecan trees on furthest north side of Anne Hamilton trail. Not very productive.
